candidates.row_label: Amortisation and depreciation of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: Explicit separate D&A line above EBIT, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales/materials-related and sits outside the selected COGS row 'Material Expenses'. No COGS-specific D&A row is visible, so conservatively do not assign this total D&A line to COGS.
Looks like a more specific amortisation disclosure, likely a component of broader amortisation rather than a COGS-specific D&A line. Not labelled as COGS-related.
Label exists but no visible values; also not identified as COGS-specific.
Label exists but no visible values; also not identified as COGS-specific.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Material Expenses'. The visible D&A disclosures are separate operating lines, not COGS-specific sub-lines of 'Material Expenses'. To avoid unsupported allocation and double counting, no COGS D&A row is added separately.

candidates.row_label: Amortisation and depreciation of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: Explicit separate D&A line above EBIT at the same operating level as the selected overhead rows 'Personnel costs' and 'Other external costs'. Since earlier XSGA selection intentionally avoided D&A and no SG&A subtotal exists, this separate summary D&A line should be added later to the XSGA bucket rather than assumed embedded in the selected rows.
More granular amortisation disclosure that appears to be a component of the broader D&A line. Per summary-vs-components rule, prefer the summary row and do not include this separately.
No visible values and appears subordinate to the summary D&A disclosure; not preferred over the summary row.
No visible values and appears subordinate to the summary D&A disclosure; not preferred over the summary row.

final_choice.row_label: Amortisation and depreciation of tangible and intangible assets

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Personnel costs' and 'Other external costs' and explicitly excluded D&A in the prior mapping. A separate operating D&A summary row is visible above EBIT and should be added later. The more specific 'Amortisation of acquisition-related intangible assets' is not selected to avoid double counting because the summary D&A row is preferred.
